name: novelist
description: Plan, write, illustrate, and publish structured Markdown novels in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Initialize a Markdown novel workspace, develop settings, characters, materials and plots, control chapter continuity and reader understanding, create visual assets, and package the manuscript as a validated EPUB.
defaultPrompt: Create a new novel workspace and help me define its premise.
Plan the next chapter with continuity and reader understanding in mind.
Publish the current manuscript as a validated EPUB.
